title: Endpoint Hunt Foundation
description: Shared endpoint-hunt building blocks for suspicious process and host activity.

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Tenant, environment, or business unit selector.

parameters.name: lookback_hours
parameters.description: Hours of endpoint and SIEM telemetry to review.

parameters.name: focus_host
parameters.description: Optional hostname or asset identifier to prioritize.

parameters.name: focus_user
parameters.description: Optional user context to correlate against endpoint activity.

telemetry_requirements.description: Process creation, parent-child lineage, command line, and host context.

blind_spots: Hosts without endpoint telemetry or with aggressive command-line truncation will reduce the quality of endpoint hunts.
